fred.description: Federal Reserve Economic Data (FRED). Free, no API key required. Provides macro data: Treasury yields, credit spreads, employment, CPI, Fed funds rate, GDP, housing starts, and more.

_paidProviders._note: These connectors require a subscription or API key from the respective provider. Uncomment and configure to enable. URLs sourced from Anthropic's financial-services-plugins repo (Feb 2026).

factset.description: FactSet: real-time market data, fundamental analysis, earnings estimates, research insights.

spglobal.description: S&P Global Capital IQ: company tearsheets, earnings previews, transaction data.

pitchbook.description: PitchBook: private company data, M&A transactions, PE/VC fund data.

morningstar.description: Morningstar: fund analytics, equity research, portfolio analysis.

daloopa.description: Daloopa: machine-readable financial models and company fundamentals.

aiera.description: Aiera: earnings call transcripts, investor presentations, event monitoring.

lseg.description: LSEG: real-time pricing, yield curves, FX analytics, fixed income data.

moodys.description: Moody's: credit ratings, risk analytics, economic forecasts.

mtnewswires.description: MT Newswires: real-time financial news and market data.
